HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KATHRYN STEBNER OF STEBNER AND ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-415-362-9800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT SHANNON K. GOECKE IS DENIED. The Sheriff to garnish $200.00 a month from defendant's wages. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
